nodes.label: Allow Interruption
nodes.rationale: Per-node toggle gives fine-grained control: disable for legal disclaimers and confirmations, enable for Q&A and open discussion.

nodes.label: VAD (Voice Activity Detection)
nodes.rationale: Silero VAD runs at 8 or 16 kHz only; pipeline sample rate is capped at 16 kHz to satisfy this. Realtime providers supply their own VAD so local Silero is skipped.
